items.title: Adopt vitest as canonical testing strategy
items.body: Selected vitest as the unified testing strategy across all packages. Testing scope covers unit, integration, and snapshot tests. Strategy emphasizes fast feedback and TypeScript-native execution. Replaces ad-hoc testing patterns with one uniform framework.

items.title: Property-based testing complements example testing strategy
items.body: Property-based testing layered on top of the example-based testing strategy. fast-check binding for vitest enables invariant assertions. Strategy prefers property tests for pure functions and example tests for IO-bound surfaces. Testing coverage rises measurably.

items.title: Testing strategy for fixture-based regression coverage
items.body: Testing strategy mandates fixture-based regression coverage for every public surface. The testing harness loads fixtures from data/ uniformly. Strategy keeps fixture scope tight: one testing fixture per behavior. Strategy review enforced at audit time. Reviewed against the canonical schema rules.

items.title: Scheduled cron jobs for periodic agents
items.body: Introduces a scheduling primitive backed by cron expressions. Periodic agents declare their schedule in YAML. The scheduler dispatches at the configured cadence with jitter to avoid thundering herd issues during peak load.

items.title: Testing strategy for non-deterministic timing-sensitive specs
items.body: Workflow executor subprocess testing produces sporadic failures. Testing strategy needs hardening for non-deterministic timing-sensitive specs. Reproducible in roughly one in twenty runs. Mitigation via deterministic seed injection and explicit await fences in testing harness.

items.title: Performance profiling harness for workflow steps
items.body: Adds performance instrumentation to the workflow executor. Captures per-step latency, memory residency, and subprocess startup overhead. Performance regressions surface as build-gate failures. Profiling output integrates with existing trace pipeline.

items.title: Testing strategy review under coverage gate
items.body: Reviewed the testing strategy against the coverage-gate proposal. Strategy retains 80% line coverage as the minimum bar; testing branches that fall below the threshold trigger CI failure. Strategy review enacted per the conformance audit.

items.title: TLS 1.3 enforcement on inbound API endpoints
items.body: All HTTP endpoints reject connections below TLS 1.3. Security review flagged downgrade attacks as the dominant threat surface. Cipher allowlist constrained; audit logging captures handshake failures for security incident triage.
